objective: Verify that CI, release workflow, and version-bump script correctly support the new grove-core + grove Cargo workspace structure.
key_changes: release.yml correctly uses -p grove to pin the binary, preserving asset names unchanged
ci.yml uses --workspace flag ensuring both workspace members are built and tested
bump-version.sh handles all 5 version sites in one atomic, idempotent operation
Lockfile assertions cover both grove and grove-core entries, preventing drift
Verify-only files (setup-local-test.sh, npm install.js, homebrew formula) resolve correctly
No downstream impact to end users — asset names and install paths unchanged
